# Agent Recharge

Agent Recharge lets you fund an AI agent wallet from any EVM chain using LayerZero cross-chain infrastructure. Anyone can send tokens to an agent — the payer chooses their source chain and token, the destination is fixed.

## How to generate a payment link

Use the `agent-recharge` npm package:

```bash
npm install agent-recharge
```

```typescript
import { recharge, USDC } from "agent-recharge";

const url = recharge({
  toChain: "base",            // LayerZero chain key (string)
  toToken: USDC["base"],      // Token contract address on destination chain
  toAddress: "0xYourWallet",  // Agent wallet address
  agentName: "TradingBot",    // Optional: shown in payment UI
  toAmount: 50,               // Optional: pre-fill amount (human-readable)
  minAmountUSD: 10,           // Optional: minimum USD value
});
// Returns: https://agent-recharge.vercel.app/pay?toChain=base&toToken=0x833...&toAddress=0x...
```

## URL parameters

| Parameter     | Required | Description                                         |
|---------------|----------|-----------------------------------------------------|
| toChain       | yes      | LZ chain key, e.g. "base", "arbitrum", "ethereum"   |
| toToken       | yes      | Token contract address on the destination chain     |
| toAddress     | yes      | Wallet address to receive funds                     |
| toAmount      | no       | Pre-filled amount (human-readable, e.g. "50")       |
| agentName     | no       | Display name shown in the UI                        |
| agentLogo     | no       | URL of an image shown in the UI                     |
| minAmountUSD  | no       | Minimum transfer value in USD                       |

## Supported chains (EVM)

ethereum, base, arbitrum, optimism, polygon, bsc, avalanche, linea, scroll, zksync-era, mantle, and 100+ more via LayerZero.

## Common token addresses

USDC on Base: 0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913
USDC on Arbitrum: 0xaf88d065e77c8cC2239327C5EDb3A432268e5831
USDC on Ethereum: 0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48

## Example link

https://agent-recharge.vercel.app/pay?toChain=base&toToken=0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913&toAddress=0xYourWallet&agentName=TradingBot&toAmount=50
